calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar May-03-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Bridget Badasow, Defendant/Claimant appearing on her own behalf.

No other appearance. The court swore in the defendant, took oral and written evidence concerning her financial statements and granted the claim of exemption. Defendant Bridget Badasow's Claim Of Exemption is granted. Order signed. Pro Tem Judge: Ernst Halperin, not reported
